citations.locator: Living Cost Questions - Trimester 2, Monthly Household Expenditure > Housing > Rent, Mortgage or Accommodation Costs

findings.text: The applicant self-reported monthly accommodation costs of £5,526.66 in the Living Cost Questions form.
The reported £5,526.66 monthly accommodation cost is anomalously high for a student and may indicate a data entry error or misclassification (e.g., annual vs monthly).
No independent verification evidence (tenancy agreement, bank statements, university accommodation records) is available in this work order to confirm the figure.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Rent Figure Verification Report

**Source:** NAP-SRC-0008 (Living Cost Questions - Trimester 2)

**Reported Figure:** £5,526.66 per month (self-reported)

**Status:** Unverified – no independent evidence provided.

**Risk:** The figure is anomalously high for a student's monthly accommodation. It may be a data entry error (e.g., annual figure entered in a monthly field) or a misclassification.

**Recommended Action:** Cross-reference with:
- Bank statements uploaded by the applicant (referenced in the source but not included in this work order)
- Any tenancy agreement or university accommodation contract
- Applicant's personal supporting statement for explanation of high costs
proposed_artifacts.title: Rent Figure Verification Report

proposed_tasks.instructions: Locate the bank statements uploaded by the applicant (referenced in NAP-SRC-0008) and any tenancy agreement or university accommodation contract in the matter sources. Compare the actual rent payments shown on the statements with the self-reported £5,526.66 figure. Determine whether the figure is monthly or annual and whether it is supported by documentary evidence.
proposed_tasks.title: Cross-reference accommodation cost with bank statements and tenancy agreement

risk_flags.text: Self-reported accommodation cost of £5,526.66/month is unsupported by independent evidence and may be erroneous or inflated.

summary: The source NAP-SRC-0008 (Living Cost Questions form) contains a self-reported monthly accommodation cost of £5,526.66 entered by the applicant. The figure is supported by the extracted text but is an unverified self-declaration. No independent evidence (tenancy agreement, bank statements, or university accommodation records) is present in this work order to confirm or refute the amount. The figure appears anomalously high for a student's monthly rent, raising a risk flag. A follow-up task is proposed to cross-reference the applicant's bank statements and any tenancy agreement.

uncertainties.text: Whether the £5,526.66 figure is a monthly or annual amount is unclear from the source; the form labels it 'Monthly Household Expenditure' but the value is unusually high for a monthly student rent.
No tenancy agreement, lease, or university accommodation invoice has been provided to corroborate the self-reported accommodation cost.
